## Description

Please include a summary of the changes made in this PR and why these changes are needed.

## Related Issue

Fixes # (issue number)

## Type of Change

Please select the relevant options:

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] Feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Testing

Please describe how you tested these changes:

- [ ] Tested locally on macOS (specify version if relevant)
- [ ] All existing tests pass
- [ ] Added new tests (if applicable)

## Hook Testing (if applicable)

- [ ] SSH connection hooks tested
- [ ] Menu bar functionality verified
- [ ] Host management window tested
- [ ] Settings/preferences tested

## Security & Data

- [ ] No hardcoded credentials, API keys, or personal data
- [ ] Sensitive data properly handled through Keychain
- [ ] No unintended file system changes

## Documentation

- [ ] Updated API documentation (if applicable)
